output.answer: South by Southwest typically starts on March 7th, 2024. Based on historical patterns and public information, the 2024 event will run from March 7-16 in Austin, Texas.
output.formatted:
South by Southwest typically starts on March 7th, 2024. Based on historical patterns and public information, the 2024 event will run from March 7-16 in Austin, Texas.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?startDate WHERE {
  ?event wdt:P31 wd:Q11453 ; wdt:P276 wd:Q4427 ; rdfs:label 'South by Southwest' @en ; wdt:P580 ?startDate .
}
```
